message:
feat: Add typing module support (TypeVar, Generic as no-ops)

Make typing module imports work correctly for AOT compilation:

- Change typing module to inline-only (no const typing = std)
- Make TypeVar() calls emit void{} (discards args)
- Skip TypeVar assignments in module analyzer (no var T declaration)
- Skip TypeVar assignments in genAssign (emits comment only)
- Handle ParamSpec and TypeVarTuple the same way

This allows common typing patterns like:
  from typing import TypeVar
  T = TypeVar('T')

Note: Full Generic[T] support would require true polymorphism which
AOT compilation cannot fully support - functions/classes are monomorphic.
